meta_description: Instant quotes for "as machined" parts. Protolabs Network' standard surface finish. Parts are machined and deburred, sharp edges are chamfered. Quality surface finishes.

sections.text: Surface finishes As machined services Our standard finish, parts are first machined to a surface roughness of Ra 3.2Î¼m / Ra 126Î¼in, deburred and sharp edges are chamfered. Get instant quote
